label: Psychic ritual -- summon fleshbeasts
description: Ritual (enemy-cast) that summons fleshbeasts. The number of fleshbeasts is determined by threat-point scaling.

fleshbeastPointsFromThreatPointsCurve.label: Fleshbeast points from threat points curve
fleshbeastPointsFromThreatPointsCurve.description: Curve mapping the raid's threat-point budget to the combat points spent summoning fleshbeasts.
